title: BHI/LB + v2 salts media
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9jo5t","text":"Vibrio natriegens  grows well media containing v2 salts e.g. BHI + v2 and LBv2 (link). Furthermore, such media is routinely used for culturing this organism (Weinstock et al., 2016). However, care must be taken during preperation not to autoclave v2 salts and media together. This protocol first generates separate solutions before sterilising and combining them.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":80,"length":4}],"data":{}},{"key":"a3i87","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"8ntjq","text":"","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"avrsh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"D83034C2501E11EBB1D70A58A9FEAC2A","url":"http://2018.igem.org/Team:Marburg/Results"}},"1":{"type":"citation","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"495F751D341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","title":"Vibrio natriegens as a fast-growing host for molecular biology.","protocol_guid":"","journal":"Nature methods","date":"2016-10-01T00:00:00Z","created_on":"2026-02-10T22:33:37Z","doi":"https://doi.org/10.1038/nmeth.3970","authors":"Weinstock MT, Hesek ED, Wilson CM, Gibson DG","can_edit":false}}}}

steps: Prepare the following salt solutions at the given concentrations: 5 Molarity (M), NaCl 1 Molarity (M), KCl 1 Molarity (M), MgCl2.6H2O
Dissolve 18.5 g, BHI dry medium or 12.5 g, LB Broth (Miller) in 400 mL ddH 2 O in a 1 L graduated bottle.
Under sterile conditions, transfer the following volumes of stock salt solutions to the BHI media: %s %s
Adjust the volume to 500 mL using sterile ddH2O.
creator: Matthew Haines
